name: discord-bot-boilerplate
description: Opinionated TypeScript Discord.js v14 boilerplate with command deployment, environment management, and guild-scoped storage.

scripts.start:dev: npm run verify && dotenv -e .env.dev -- tsx src/index.ts
scripts.start:prod: npm run deploy:prod && dotenv -e .env.prod -- tsx src/index.ts
scripts.deploy:dev: npm run verify && dotenv -e .env.dev -- tsx src/deploy-commands.ts dev
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run verify && dotenv -e .env.prod -- tsx src/deploy-commands.ts prod
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm run lint
